All right, weigh in day step two. So now we are going to be talking with our clients about nutrition and supplements. So number one, we're going to follow S3 by seeding supplements. So essentially what that means is as soon as you sit down and you start talking about the nutrition plan, you'll say, hey, hold on a second. I know everybody wants to know about supplements, but we'll get to that. Let's get through these parts first. So you're kind of giving them that anticipation of supplements being one of the main factors of their results. So then you want to explain the food list. Like you just told them you were going to, and you want to explain your plan of progression. So the explanation of the food list is extremely simple. This is all you're going to eat for the first two weeks. Right? But I think it's important that you explain the progression that, hey, look, every two weeks you're going to be coming back to the gym and we're going to progress it. We're going to change it. We're going to make it more effective and more effective as your body starts to go through changes and transformations. So that you are going to do after the first part, then you are going to explain the exercise, right? And you are planning progression for that. So you'll explain like, hey, we're going to get started with X amount of steps or whatever your programming is going to be for them. And then explain to them that every two weeks you're going to be progressing that as their body becomes more and more conditioned to the exercise so you can progress it and make it more difficult so they still see the benefits. Then you want to explain what you need from them to maximize their results. So this is where you're talking about the daily scale pictures that they are going to need to send to you, the bi-weekly check-ins that they are going to have at the gym unless they are too far out of the radius. You can do them via Zoom if you want. But this is where you explain to them what you need from them. Okay? And then finally, now you're getting back into the supplements like you said you would and you are going to assume close using all of the training in the supplement selling secrets. You are going to assume close the ultimate or downselling to a four pack if necessary. And this is just as you're going through it, you'll know from the training, but what flavors do you want? Do you want blue raspberry or do you want a punch? And so that is going to be the second part of the way in day. This should take about 15 minutes to do. So the first part should take about 15 minutes and the second part should take about 15 minutes as well. As you get more and more familiar with the process, it might take a little bit less putting you at a total time of maybe 30 minutes for the whole process. So now what we're going to do is get into step three, the final step of way in day.
